what: AC generation for FSC-2417: mode=supplemented_existing, clauses=12 (happy=True, error=True, edge=True, regulatory=True)
why: AC Generator supplemented/validated acceptance criteria for a HIGH-FCA story. 8 gap(s) filled; 4 gap(s) remain.

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: View consolidated suitability score for a fully assessed client
given: Given a client has a Suitability__c record with status = 'Complete' and a linked RiskProfile__c with risk_level = 'Moderate'
And the client's investment objectives are recorded on the Suitability__c record with objectives_score__c populated
And the client's FinancialAccount has financial_circumstances_last_updated__c within the last 12 months
when: When the Wealth Manager opens the suitability-dashboard LWC on the FSC Client 360 page
then: Then the FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c value is displayed prominently as a numeric score between 0 and 100
And a dimension breakdown is shown: Risk Profile 40%, Investment Objectives 35%, Financial Circumstances 25%
And the date of the most recently updated Suitability__c dimension record is displayed for each dimension

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Automatic score recalculation on Suitability__c update via Platform Event
given: Given a client's FinancialAccount has ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c = 72
And the SuitabilityScoreCalculator Apex class is active and deployed
And the suitability-dashboard LWC is open on the FSC Client 360 page for the adviser
when: When a Suitability__c record linked to the FinancialAccount is saved with an updated risk_classification__c value following an annual review
then: Then the SuitabilityScoreCalculator recalculates FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c within 5 seconds
And a SuitabilityScoreUpdated__e Platform Event is fired containing the new score and the FinancialAccount Id
And the suitability-dashboard LWC reflects the updated score without requiring a full page refresh

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Stale financial circumstances trigger a 'Requires Review' banner
given: Given a client's FinancialAccount has financial_circumstances_last_updated__c more than 12 months in the past
And the client's Suitability__c record and RiskProfile__c are otherwise complete
when: When the Wealth Manager opens the suitability-dashboard LWC on the FSC Client 360 page
then: Then a 'Review Required' banner is displayed on the suitability-dashboard component showing the date of the last circumstances update
And the FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c field is shown as 'Requires Review' rather than a numeric value
And the Wealth Manager is presented with a prompt to initiate a financial circumstances review

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: COBS 9.2 mandatory warning gate for Retail Client with low suitability score
given: Given a client is classified as Retail Client (client_classification__c = 'Retail') under COBS 3.4 on their FinancialAccount
And FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c = 44 (below the 50-point threshold)
And the suitability-dashboard LWC is open on the FSC Client 360 page
when: When the Wealth Manager clicks 'Record Advice' on the suitability dashboard
then: Then a mandatory COBS 9.2 suitability warning modal is displayed before any advice record is created
And the Wealth Manager cannot proceed to record advice until they explicitly acknowledge the warning
And upon acknowledgement, a COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c audit record is created linked to the FinancialAccount with timestamp and adviser UserId

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: COBS 9.2 warning is not triggered for Professional Client with low score
given: Given a client is classified as Professional Client (client_classification__c = 'Professional') under COBS 3.4 on their FinancialAccount
And FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c = 38 (below the 50-point threshold)
when: When the Wealth Manager clicks 'Record Advice' on the suitability dashboard
then: Then no COBS 9.2 suitability warning modal is displayed
And the Wealth Manager proceeds to record advice without interruption
And no COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c record is created for this interaction

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Consumer Duty — suitability dashboard presents score and warnings in a clear, non-misleading format
given: Given a client has a fully computed FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c of 65
And the client is classified as Retail Client under COBS 3.4
when: When the Wealth Manager opens the suitability-dashboard LWC on the FSC Client 360 page
then: Then the consolidated score, dimension breakdown, and last-assessment dates are each labelled with plain-language descriptions visible without scrolling
And no dimension label, score value, or tooltip contains misleading or technically ambiguous text that could cause the adviser to misinterpret the client's suitability status
And the dashboard passes WCAG 2.1 AA colour-contrast requirements for all score indicators and banners (supporting Consumer Duty PS22/9 Outcome 3 — Consumer Understanding)

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Score calculation blocked when RiskProfile__c is absent
given: Given a client's FinancialAccount has no linked RiskProfile__c record
And a Suitability__c record exists for the client with objectives and circumstances scores populated
when: When the SuitabilityScoreCalculator Apex class is invoked for the client's FinancialAccount
then: Then the SuitabilityScoreCalculator throws a SuitabilityCalculationException with message 'RiskProfile__c is required for score calculation'
And FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c is not updated and retains its previous value
And the suitability-dashboard LWC displays an 'Incomplete Assessment — Risk Profile Missing' error state to the Wealth Manager

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Score calculation blocked when investment objectives dimension is missing
given: Given a client's Suitability__c record has objectives_score__c = null
And a valid RiskProfile__c and financial circumstances record exist for the client
when: When the SuitabilityScoreCalculator Apex class is invoked for the client's FinancialAccount
then: Then the SuitabilityScoreCalculator does not write a new ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c value
And a SuitabilityCalculationException is raised with message 'Investment objectives score is required'
And the suitability-dashboard LWC displays an 'Incomplete Assessment — Objectives Missing' error state

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Consolidated score boundary — minimum valid score of 0 renders correctly
given: Given all three Suitability__c dimension scores are set to their minimum permissible values
And the SuitabilityScoreCalculator is invoked for the associated FinancialAccount
when: When the weighted sum across risk (40%), objectives (35%), and circumstances (25%) is calculated
then: Then FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c is set to 0.00
And the suitability-dashboard LWC renders the score as '0' without null pointer or display errors
And the COBS 9.2 mandatory warning gate is triggered for any Retail Client with this score

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Consolidated score boundary — maximum valid score of 100 renders correctly
given: Given all three Suitability__c dimension scores are set to their maximum permissible values
And the SuitabilityScoreCalculator is invoked for the associated FinancialAccount
when: When the weighted sum across risk (40%), objectives (35%), and circumstances (25%) is calculated
then: Then FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c is set to 100.00
And the suitability-dashboard LWC renders the score as '100' without overflow or display errors
And no COBS 9.2 warning is triggered for a Retail Client with this score

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: Concurrent Suitability__c updates do not produce a race condition on the consolidated score
given: Given a client's FinancialAccount has ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c = 68
And two separate Suitability__c dimension records (risk and objectives) are updated simultaneously by two different system processes
when: When both Suitability__c save operations trigger the SuitabilityScoreCalculator within the same transaction window
then: Then FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c reflects the result of the most recently completed calculation without data corruption or partial writes
And exactly one SuitabilityScoreUpdated__e Platform Event is published per completed recalculation cycle
And no duplicate or conflicting score values are persisted on the FinancialAccount record

ac_clauses.scenario: Scenario: SYSC audit trail — COBS 9.2 acknowledgement log is retrievable for compliance review
given: Given a Wealth Manager has previously acknowledged a COBS 9.2 warning for a Retail Client with ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c = 44
And a COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c record was created linked to the FinancialAccount at that time
when: When a Compliance Officer queries the COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c object filtered by FinancialAccount Id
then: Then the acknowledgement record is returned with adviser UserId, acknowledgement timestamp, score value at time of acknowledgement, and linked FinancialAccount Id
And the record is read-only and cannot be deleted or modified by non-system profiles
And the audit log entry is available to support SYSC Senior Manager oversight and FCA compliance review

gaps_filled: regulatory: COBS 3.4 scoping — warning correctly suppressed for Professional Client
regulatory: Consumer Duty PS22/9 Outcome 3 — clear and non-misleading dashboard presentation
error_path: SuitabilityScoreCalculator blocked when RiskProfile__c is absent
error_path: SuitabilityScoreCalculator blocked when investment objectives score is null
edge_case: boundary score — minimum value of 0 renders without errors
edge_case: boundary score — maximum value of 100 renders without errors
edge_case: concurrent Suitability__c updates do not cause race condition on ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c
regulatory: SYSC audit trail — COBS 9.2 acknowledgement log retrievable by Compliance Officer
remaining_gaps: Performance / load criteria: no NFR defined for SuitabilityScoreCalculator under bulk Suitability__c update scenarios (e.g. batch annual review processing 200+ records) — bulkification limits and governor limit behaviour are unspecified in the story

FLS / permission model: no acceptance criteria cover which profiles or permission sets can read FinancialAccount.ConsolidatedSuitabilityScore__c and COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c — field-level security requirements are out of scope in the current story but represent a MEDIUM-FCA gap

Platform Event delivery guarantee: no criteria specify behaviour if SuitabilityScoreUpdated__e delivery fails or is delayed beyond 5 seconds — retry logic and fallback display state on the LWC are undefined

COBS_9_2_Acknowledgement__c object definition: the story references audit logging but does not define this object's schema, RecordType, or retention policy — test data setup may be blocked until the object is formally created
